examples: Several data formats fit the raster model well.
SVG has many advantages over raster images.
It goes beyond 2-d raster formats to include voxel, or 3-d, raster format.
It supports both raster and vector graphics, TWAIN devices, color separations, and various photo filters.
It supports both raster and vector graphics, color separations, various photo filters, and the usual text, paint, and draw functions.
